zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Warburton於1546年出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓時，她的父親Sir Piers Peter Warburton58歲，母親Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton46歲。她於1560年與Sir William Booth在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她於1591年住在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯。她去世於1628年12月27日在英國英格蘭爾包頓享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾包頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Warburton于1546年出生在英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Piers Peter Warburton58岁，母亲Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton46岁。她于1560年与Sir William Booth在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她于1591年住在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯。她去世于1628年12月27日在英国英格兰爾包頓享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾包頓。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Warburton was born in 1546, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Piers Peter Warburton, was 58 and her mother, Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton, was 46. She married Sir William Booth in 1560, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. She lived in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England in 1591. She died on 27 December 1628, in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Warburton est née en 1546, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Piers Peter Warburton, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Booth en 1560, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles. Elle a vécu à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1591. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1628, à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Bowdon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Warburton 1546 in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Piers Peter Warburton 58 und ihre Mutter Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton 46. Sie hat 1560 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1591 hat sie in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England gelebt. Sie starb am 27. Dezember 1628 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bowdon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Warburton è nata il nel 1546 nel Warburton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Piers Peter Warburton, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Booth nel 1560, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie. Vissuto a Great Budworth, Cheshire, England nel 1591. Morì il 27 dicembre 1628, nel Bowdon, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Bowdon, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Warburtonが1546年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Piers Peter Warburtonは58歳，母Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburtonは46歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでSir William Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年にはイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスに住んでいた。彼女は1628年12月27日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボウドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Warburton(이)가 1546년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Piers Peter Warburton(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Sir William Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1591년도에 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 살았다. 그녀는 1628년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보우던에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보우던에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Booth em 1560, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela viveu em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1591. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Warburton родилась в 1546 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Piers Peter Warburton было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Booth в 1560 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она жила в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия в 1591 году. Она умерла 27 декабря 1628 г. в местности боудон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности боудон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Warburton nació en 1546, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Piers Peter Warburton, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir William Booth en 1560, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas. Vivió en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1591. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1628, en Bowdon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Bowdon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
